case_title: RANGEL CANCHE VS. NASS ENTERPRISE LLC,

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANCHE, RANGEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NASS ENTERPRISE LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA DENNY'S RESTAURANT $14,007.95 PRINCIPAL, $398.90 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,631.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
